/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/BouncingBall.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/BouncingBall.dir/src/scripts/cpp/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BouncingBall.dir/src/scripts/cpp/ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BouncingBall.dir/src/scripts/cpp/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BouncingBall.dir/src/scripts/cpp/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BouncingBall.dir/src/scripts/cpp/sound.cpp.o -o BouncingBall  /usr/lib/libSDL3.so.0.4.10
